title: ctenitis chiriquiana
intro: Ctenitis chiriquiana, also known as the Chiriqui fern or Chiriqui tree fern, is a species of tree fern in the family Dryopteridaceae. It has been found to possess medicinal properties, particularly in its ability to inhibit the growth of certain microorganisms and reduce inflammation. The health benefits of Ctenitis chiriquiana include its potential to alleviate symptoms of various diseases, such as fever and respiratory infections, due to its antimicrobial and anti-inflammatory properties. Traditionally, the plant has been used in herbal preparations, including infusions and decoctions, which are made by steeping the leaves and stems in hot water to extract its medicinal compounds.
